svg.title: Anatomy of a Typst page in Quarto
svg.desc: A schematic of a Typst page rendered through Quarto. The outer rectangle is the page itself, labelled papersize. A single grey block represents the body content area. Around it, four measuring lines mark the page margins, labelled margin: top, margin: bottom, margin: left, and margin: right. A page number at the bottom of the page is labelled page-numbering.

g.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', monospace
